name: Santa Paperweight
recipeIngredient: silicone sealer (good for use with water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the jar and lid; dry thoroughly.
2. Glue the ceramic Santa to the inside lid using silicone sealer; let dry completely.
3. Fill the jar with water, ensuring that the water level reaches just below the rim of the jar.
4. Add a scant 1/4 teaspoonful of moth flakes into the water.
5. Screw the lid onto the jar tightly as possible.
6. If necessary, add more water to bring the water level up to the top of the jar.
7. Apply additional silicone sealer around the edge of the lid and screw it tightly to the jar.
8. Allow the silicone sealer to dry completely before using or displaying the paperweight.
